No Poverty.reason: Course explicitly covers 'social enterprises' and 'creating shared value,' which are business models designed to address social issues and promote pro-poor strategies, directly aligning with poverty alleviation efforts.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferable content in the syllabus relates to food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture practices.
